questions.question_text: Rewrite 'I have never seen such a lack of ethics' starting with 'Never'.
options: Never I have seen such a lack of ethics...
Never have I seen such a lack of ethics...
questions.correct_answer: Never have I seen such a lack of ethics...
questions.explanation: Negatif zarf (Never) başa gelince devrik cümle (Inversion) kurulur.

questions.question_text: Not only ______ (he / be) talented, but he is also hardworking.
questions.explanation: 'Not only' ile başlayan cümle devrik olur.

questions.question_text: Seldom ______ (we / experience) such extreme weather in this region.
Little ______ (she / know) that the surprise was waiting for her.
Only then ______ (I / realize) the mistake I had made.

options: The rain started as soon as we left.
No sooner had we left than the rain started.
We left and then it rained.
Hardly we left when it rained.
questions.correct_answer: No sooner had we left than the rain started.
questions.explanation: 'No sooner... than' kalıbı inversion ile daha retorik bir hava verir.

questions.question_text: Under no circumstances ______ (you / should) reveal your password.
Scarcely ______ (the sun / set) when the stars appeared.
questions.explanation: 'Scarcely... when' kalıbı Past Perfect ve Inversion ile kullanılır.

questions.question_text: Rarely ______ (she / go) to the cinema anymore.

options: Vurgu yapmak için veya negatif bir zarfla cümle başladığında
questions.correct_answer: Vurgu yapmak için veya negatif bir zarfla cümle başladığında
questions.explanation: Akademik ve edebi anlatımda vurgu aracıdır.

questions.question_text: I didn't notice the fire until much later. -> Not until much later ______ I notice the fire.
questions.explanation: 'Not until' ile başlayan yapıda inversion ana cümlede (notice tarafında) olur.

questions.question_text: So beautiful ______ (be) the view that we couldn't look away.
questions.explanation: So + Sıfat... that yapısı devrik olabilir.

questions.question_text: Hangi kelime 'Only' ile başladığında ikinci cümlede devriklik İSTEMEZ?
questions.explanation: Only + Zaman bağlacı olan durumlarda devriklik ana cümlede olur.

questions.question_text: Had I ______ (know) the truth, I wouldn't have said that.
Rewrite: 'We little suspected that he was a spy.'
questions.explanation: Little (zarf) başa gelir, Simple Past devriktir (did we suspect).
